title: Trondheim Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Trondheim, with a Z-Score of -4.37. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Trondheim are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The high humidity level of 84% and moderate wind speed of 15.1 km/h are exacerbating the cold temperatures. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 16.3 GG indicates a high energy demand to maintain comfortable indoor temperatures.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the cold snap immediately.
